Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "MAZIACS-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Maziacs.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 to setup the correct VICII settings, the necessary BASIC pointers and execute the RUN command to start the game program. The BASIC start pointer ($2B/$2C) is set to $0819 to skip the loading of the game file from tape (which will already have been loaded when the dump is taken).
Note: to dump, simply wait until the title screen is displayed after the loading screen, then dump with the monitor.
The loading screen was converted from the Spectrum version by Andy Green (https://www.facebook.com/AndyGreenPixelArt).
